hook.text: Did you know 38% of patient calls are missed after hours?

scene_1.text: Your patients hang up and go elsewhere when calls aren't answered.

scene_2.text: AI voice agents handle calls without needing a human for every query.
scene_2.visual_suggestion: Animated AI assistant taking a call, scheduling appointments

scene_3.text: Here's how: Call comes in, AI triages, books or escalates in seconds.

scene_4.text: Clinics using Voicecare.ai cut no-shows by 40% in just 90 days.

scene_5.text: In 2025, clinics with zero wait times will be the healthcare leaders.

cta.text: See for yourself. Book a free 15-min demo at voicecare.ai/demo.

scripts.topic: AI Agent Demo: New Patient Intake Scheduling Guide (2026)

hook.text: Your clinic loses 40 patients monthly due to slow scheduling!
hook.visual_suggestion: Bold text overlay of the stat with a frustrated patient on the phone.

scene_1.text: Patients hang up when they can’t schedule instantly. Competitors win. You lose.
scene_1.visual_suggestion: Split-screen: patient hanging up, competitor's phone ringing.

scene_2.text: Imagine AI handling your appointments 24/7. Zero wait, zero hassle.
scene_2.visual_suggestion: Animated clock showing 24/7 service with an AI icon.

scene_3.text: Here’s how: Patient calls, AI checks availability, books instantly. Done!
scene_3.visual_suggestion: Visual flowchart from call to AI booking confirmation.

scene_4.text: One clinic boosted intakes by 30% in 60 days. No extra staff needed.

scene_5.text: Stay ahead! Clinics thriving in 2026 never make patients wait.
scene_5.visual_suggestion: Futuristic clinic with happy patients and seamless service.

cta.text: See it live: link in bio for your free demo!
cta.visual_suggestion: Clickable link icon with text overlay: 'Book Demo Now!'
